layout.mobile_strategy: Sidebar moves to Sheet (Drawer) on mobile

typography.section_headers: text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 uppercase tracking-wide font-manrope

sidebar.container: h-screen sticky top-0 border-r border-slate-200 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-xl p-6 hidden lg:block overflow-y-auto no-scrollbar

category_nav.item_base: flex items-center justify-between w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm transition-all duration-200 group
category_nav.badge: text-[10px] font-mono bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full group-hover:bg-white group-hover:text-slate-700 transition-colors

price_filter.input: h-9 bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-slate-900 focus:ring-slate-900/20 transition-all text-xs

sort_dropdown.trigger: h-9 min-w-[180px] bg-white border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 font-medium

active_filters.pill: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 text-xs font-medium rounded-full border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-200 transition-colors cursor-pointer
active_filters.clear_button: text-xs text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-900 hover:underline transition-colors ml-2

implementation_steps.details: Create a `FilterSidebar` component. Use `aside` tag. Implement sticky positioning. Use `Accordion` for collapsible sections if needed, but keep it open by default for visibility.
Replace old links with the new 'Button-like' list items. Ensure 'All' is distinct or top of list. Add counts using Badge component.
Use Shadcn `Select` for currency. Use two `Input` components for Min/Max. Add a small 'Apply' button with `size='sm'` and `variant='outline'`.
Place above the product grid. Use Shadcn `Select`. Align to the right. Options: 'Name (A-Z)', 'Name (Z-A)', 'Price (Low-High)', 'Price (High-Low)'.
Hide Sidebar on mobile. Add a 'Filters' button that opens a Shadcn `Sheet` containing the `FilterSidebar` component.

universal_guidelines.spacing_rule: Use generous padding. Minimum p-6 inside the sidebar container.
